memoryArtifacts.headline: A Brief History
memoryArtifacts.description: JOHN de CLAYTON was the eldest being born about 1360. He was the eldest son and took over the Manor. He married Dame Mary Fereby. They had three sons: Thomas, Robert and William. John died in 1404 and …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord John de Clayton V於1360年出生在英國藍卡爾利藍德時，他的父親Lord John de Clayton IV25歲，母親Mary Langton39歲。他和Dame Mary Fereby至少有4個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1404年在他的家鄉享年44歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾利藍德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord John de Clayton V于1360年出生在英国藍卡爾利藍德时，他的父亲Lord John de Clayton IV25岁，母亲Mary Langton39岁。他和Dame Mary Fereby至少有4个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1404年在他的家乡享年44岁，埋葬在英国英格兰藍卡爾利藍德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clayton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places, in Yorkshire, Lancashire, Staffordshire, and Sussex, named Clayton, from Old English clǣg ‘clay’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Cleeton
meanings: English (Shropshire and Worcestershire): variant of   Clayton  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord John de Clayton V was born in 1360, in Leyland, Lancashire, England, his father, Lord John de Clayton IV, was 25 and his mother, Mary Langton, was 39. He had at least 4 sons and 3 daughters with Dame Mary Fereby. He died in 1404, in his hometown, at the age of 44, and was buried in Leyland, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord John de Clayton V est né en 1360, à Leyland, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Lord John de Clayton IV, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mary Langton, avait 39 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles avec Dame Mary Fereby. Il est décédé en 1404, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Leyland, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord John de Clayton V 1360 in Leyland, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord John de Clayton IV 25 und seine Mutter Mary Langton 39. Er hatte mit Dame Mary Fereby mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1404 im Alter von 44 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Leyland, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord John de Clayton V è nato il nel 1360 nel Leyland, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Lord John de Clayton IV, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Mary Langton, aveva 39 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie con Dame Mary Fereby. Morì nel 1404, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Leyland, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord John de Clayton Vが1360年にイギリスランカシュアイアリーランドで生まれた時，父Lord John de Clayton IVは25歳，母Mary Langtonは39歳であった。彼はDame Mary Ferebyとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1404年に故郷で44歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアリーランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord John de Clayton V(이)가 1360년 영국 랭카실르 리랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord John de Clayton IV(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Langton(은)는 39세였다. 그는 Dame Mary Fereby(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1404년 그의 고향에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 리랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord John de Clayton V nasceu em 1360, em Leyland, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord John de Clayton IV, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Mary Langton, tinha 39 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas com Dame Mary Fereby. Ele faleceu em 1404, em sua cidade natal, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Leyland, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord John de Clayton V родился в 1360 г. в местности лиланд, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Lord John de Clayton IV было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Langton, 39. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери от Dame Mary Fereby. Он умер в 1404 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности лиланд, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord John de Clayton V nació en 1360, en Leyland, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord John de Clayton IV, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Mary Langton, tenía 39 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas con Dame Mary Fereby. Murió en 1404, en su pueblo, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultado en Leyland, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
